svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

style="rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="360" y="20" width="200" height="44" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9AC4g3Q4RHcz4-5UVKGm-2" value="Webhook Receiver ClouPBX-ZCC" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="96" width="240" height="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9AC4g3Q4RHcz4-5UVKGm-3" value="Loại event?" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1"
